func github.com/ronhuafeng/llmcaller-codex-go/llmcaller/codex.New(options github.com/ronhuafeng/llmcaller-codex-go/llmcaller/codex.Options) (*github.com/ronhuafeng/llmcaller-codex-go/llmcaller/codex.Caller, error)
func github.com/ronhuafeng/llmcaller-codex-go/llmcaller/codex.ReadOnlyEphemeralOptions(runner github.com/ronhuafeng/llmcaller-codex-go/llmcaller/codex.ThreadRunner) github.com/ronhuafeng/llmcaller-codex-go/llmcaller/codex.Options
func github.com/ronhuafeng/llmcaller-codex-go/llmcaller/codex.StrictOutputSchemaFromJSON(raw encoding/json.RawMessage) (github.com/ronhuafeng/codexsdk-go/codexsdk/protocolv2.OutputSchema, error)
method github.com/ronhuafeng/llmcaller-codex-go/llmcaller/codex.Caller.CallDetailedfunc(ctx context.Context, request github.com/ronhuafeng/llmkit-go/llmadapter.Request) (github.com/ronhuafeng/codexsdk-go/codexsdk.StartedThreadRun, error)
method github.com/ronhuafeng/llmcaller-codex-go/llmcaller/codex.Caller.CallStreamfunc(ctx context.Context, request github.com/ronhuafeng/llmkit-go/llmadapter.Request) (*github.com/ronhuafeng/llmcaller-codex-go/llmcaller/codex.Stream, error)
method github.com/ronhuafeng/llmcaller-codex-go/llmcaller/codex.Caller.Callfunc(ctx context.Context, request github.com/ronhuafeng/llmkit-go/llmadapter.Request) (github.com/ronhuafeng/llmkit-go/llmadapter.Response, error)
method github.com/ronhuafeng/llmcaller-codex-go/llmcaller/codex.Details.ProviderNamefunc() string
method github.com/ronhuafeng/llmcaller-codex-go/llmcaller/codex.SchemaPolicyError.Errorfunc() string
method github.com/ronhuafeng/llmcaller-codex-go/llmcaller/codex.SchemaPolicyError.Unwrapfunc() error
method github.com/ronhuafeng/llmcaller-codex-go/llmcaller/codex.Stream.Closefunc() error
method github.com/ronhuafeng/llmcaller-codex-go/llmcaller/codex.Stream.Errfunc() error
method github.com/ronhuafeng/llmcaller-codex-go/llmcaller/codex.Stream.Nextfunc(ctx context.Context) bool
method github.com/ronhuafeng/llmcaller-codex-go/llmcaller/codex.Stream.Notificationfunc() github.com/ronhuafeng/codexsdk-go/codexsdk/protocolv2.ServerNotification
method github.com/ronhuafeng/llmcaller-codex-go/llmcaller/codex.Stream.Resultfunc() (github.com/ronhuafeng/codexsdk-go/codexsdk.StartedThreadRun, bool)
method github.com/ronhuafeng/llmcaller-codex-go/llmcaller/codex.Stream.SDKStreamfunc() *github.com/ronhuafeng/codexsdk-go/codexsdk.Stream[github.com/ronhuafeng/codexsdk-go/codexsdk.StartedThreadRun]
method github.com/ronhuafeng/llmcaller-codex-go/llmcaller/codex.Stream.Waitfunc(ctx context.Context) (github.com/ronhuafeng/codexsdk-go/codexsdk.StartedThreadRun, error)
type github.com/ronhuafeng/llmcaller-codex-go/llmcaller/codex.Caller struct{runner github.com/ronhuafeng/llmcaller-codex-go/llmcaller/codex.ThreadRunner; defaults github.com/ronhuafeng/codexsdk-go/codexsdk.StartThreadRunRequest; profile github.com/ronhuafeng/llmcaller-codex-go/llmcaller/codex.safetyProfile}
type github.com/ronhuafeng/llmcaller-codex-go/llmcaller/codex.Details struct{Run github.com/ronhuafeng/codexsdk-go/codexsdk.StartedThreadRun}
type github.com/ronhuafeng/llmcaller-codex-go/llmcaller/codex.Options struct{Runner github.com/ronhuafeng/llmcaller-codex-go/llmcaller/codex.ThreadRunner; Defaults github.com/ronhuafeng/codexsdk-go/codexsdk.StartThreadRunRequest; profile github.com/ronhuafeng/llmcaller-codex-go/llmcaller/codex.safetyProfile}
type github.com/ronhuafeng/llmcaller-codex-go/llmcaller/codex.SchemaPolicyError struct{Path string; Kind string; Err error}
type github.com/ronhuafeng/llmcaller-codex-go/llmcaller/codex.Stream struct{stream github.com/ronhuafeng/llmcaller-codex-go/llmcaller/codex.startedRunStream; sdk *github.com/ronhuafeng/codexsdk-go/codexsdk.Stream[github.com/ronhuafeng/codexsdk-go/codexsdk.StartedThreadRun]; finalize func(github.com/ronhuafeng/codexsdk-go/codexsdk.StartedThreadRun, error) (github.com/ronhuafeng/codexsdk-go/codexsdk.StartedThreadRun, error)}
type github.com/ronhuafeng/llmcaller-codex-go/llmcaller/codex.ThreadRunner interface{Start(context.Context, github.com/ronhuafeng/codexsdk-go/codexsdk.StartThreadRunRequest) (github.com/ronhuafeng/codexsdk-go/codexsdk.StartedThreadRun, error); StartStream(context.Context, github.com/ronhuafeng/codexsdk-go/codexsdk.StartThreadRunRequest) (*github.com/ronhuafeng/codexsdk-go/codexsdk.Stream[github.com/ronhuafeng/codexsdk-go/codexsdk.StartedThreadRun], error)}
var github.com/ronhuafeng/llmcaller-codex-go/llmcaller/codex.ErrEffectiveProfile error
var github.com/ronhuafeng/llmcaller-codex-go/llmcaller/codex.ErrMissingSchemaJSON error
var github.com/ronhuafeng/llmcaller-codex-go/llmcaller/codex.ErrNilThreadRunner error
